/bin/clang-10 -fPIC -O0 -g3 -Wall -Wextra -std=c99 -pedantic -g  -shared -Wl,-soname,libosl.so -o libosl.so CMakeFiles/osl.dir/source/body.c.o CMakeFiles/osl.dir/source/extensions/arrays.c.o
